summary: Frontend Developer with 2.5+ years of hands-on experience building user-centric, scalable web applications using React.js, Next.js, JavaScript, and TypeScript in Agile Scrum environments. Contributed to 10+ projects, delivering responsive interfaces, integrating REST APIs, and optimizing performance.

workExperiences.title: SDE-1 Frontend – Appscrip
responsibilities: Designed and developed secure multi-user dashboard features using React.js, Next.js, and TypeScript with JWT authentication and role-based authorization.
Integrated Strapi CMS for dynamic admin-driven content updates.
Collaborated with UI/UX designers and backend teams to integrate frontend components via REST APIs.
Optimized applications for performance, scalability, and cross-browser compatibility.
Conducted code reviews and mentored junior developers.

workExperiences.title: Web Developer – Driver on Hire
responsibilities: Integrated Google Places API and Mapbox for geolocation workflows.
Implemented real-time FCM push notifications for driver assignments.
Improved performance and Core Web Vitals compliance.

technicalSkills.items: REST APIs, Axios, Strapi CMS, JWT, Google Places API, Mapbox
Git, GitHub Actions, Docker, Webpack, AWS
